title: Fantasy World / 幻想世界
description:
"Fantasy World" is an open-world simulation game that blends deep construction and management with RPG elements. On this continent threatened by giant monsters and alien races, danger and opportunity coexist. You will lead a group of displaced survivors, starting from a single brick and a single field, gradually developing into an ideal nation capable of withstanding a millennium-scale catastrophe

🏗️ From Camp to Fortress, Build Your Defenses with Your Own HandsThe game offers a rich construction system

• Collect wood, stone, and iron ore, unlock the technology tree, and upgrade buildings

• Construct city walls, arrow towers, and magical barriers, and set up defensive works against different alien races

• Reasonably plan production zones, residential zones, and military zones to balance development and defense needs

🛡️ Recruit Heroes, Build a Diverse Army• A wide variety of hero characters: battle-hardened warriors, magic-wielding mages, and assassination experts. Each hero has unique skills and a background story

• Comprehensive growth system: Every hero and every soldier can become stronger through training, by changing equipment, and by upgrading skills

• Rich equipment system: Collect materials and craft legendary weapons with your own hands. The higher your forging level, the greater your chance to create top-tier equipment

🌍 Explore and Expand, Reforge Civilization• Dispatch scouts to explore the mist-shrouded continent, find heroes in the ruins, and unearth rare materials

• Occupy strategic locations, establish outposts, and gradually shrink the living space of alien races

• Restore abandoned city ruins, and seize the opportunity to recapture towns occupied by alien races

📜 Dynamic World, Every New Game is a New Challenge• Every step in the game is full of variables; no two playthroughs are exactly the same. Your decisions influence the direction of the world

• Prioritizing military development may lead to resource shortages, while over-expansion might leave you caught between two fronts. Will you defend your homeland or launch an expedition to eradicate alien race nests

• This is not one person's battle, but the epic saga of a group of heroes

• Recruit, train, equip, fight

• This continent is yours to protect!

"Fantasy World" is now available!
description_short: This is a large-map construction simulation combined with a roguelike game. You will build a civilization, explore the wilderness, discover mysterious underground secrets, command large armies to fight against hordes of enemies, gather various materials and equipment, and build your own kingdom.
